examples: After a good meal, the gray fox leaped away, leaving the carcass to be stripped clean by the condors.
What do you do with the carcass of a ferocious monster?
We came across the carcass of a lion.
The company released an image of an apparent rodent carcass inside the switchboard unit.
The animals were found in mud, eating a rotting pig carcass, the court heard.
